docs.name: Gradient Text Reveal
docs.description: Word-by-word text reveal with gradient coloring and blur-to-clear spring animation.

props.name: text
props.description: The exact sentence paragraph targeted for staggered rendering.

props.name: className
props.description: Add CSS classes mapping typographic configurations.

props.name: gradientFrom
props.description: Color indicating the start coordinate mapping of the visual gradient ramp.

props.name: gradientTo
props.description: Terminal color definition ending the textual mask gradient.

props.name: staggerDelay
props.description: Seconds mapping the offset differential delay evaluating subsequent sequential words.

props.name: duration
props.description: Metric representation detailing exact sequence total span (measured in seconds).

props.name: once
props.description: Prevent re-evaluating the intersection layout and permanently mark complete once run.

props.name: as
props.description: Explicit HTML element defining correct semantics matching the parent boundary box.

docs.overview: GradientTextReveal animates a gradient sweep across text as it enters the viewport — a dramatic way to introduce headlines or key phrases on scroll.

scenarios.title: Section headline reveal
scenarios.description: Fire the reveal when the section scrolls into view for a cinematic entrance.

scenarios.title: Pull quote in a blog post
scenarios.description: Highlight a key quote mid-article with a gradient sweep to re-engage readers.
